name: Hawk Dive
description: Raptor folding wings and beginning steep dive

prompts.label: raptor folding wings beginning steep hunting dive
prompts.text: raptor folding wings beginning steep hunting dive, forest clearing at dawn, wooden mallet on hollow log, morning dew stillness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, with natural decay

prompts.label: hawk tucking into stooping descent with building wind rush
prompts.text: hawk tucking into stooping descent with building wind rush, moss-covered stone garden, rain droplet on broad leaf, sun-warmed earth, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, smooth fade out

prompts.label: peregrine falcon initiating dive with accelerating air whistle
prompts.text: peregrine falcon initiating dive with accelerating air whistle, bamboo grove in gentle wind, smooth river stones clinking, birdsong tranquility, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, sustained resonance

prompts.label: bird of prey's feathers tightening as gravity pulls
prompts.text: bird of prey's feathers tightening as gravity pulls, creek bed after summer rain, fingertip-plucked kalimba tine, deep forest solitude, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, with natural decay

prompts.label: predatory focus sharpening as terminal velocity approaches
prompts.text: predatory focus sharpening as terminal velocity approaches, meadow with distant thunder, ceramic wind chime in breeze, waterfall mist on skin, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, smooth fade out
